content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1.08%, Bank Nifty -1.14%, Metal -2.12%, PSU Bank -1.94%, VIX +6.48% to 18.57 — broad risk-off with crude/geopolitical premium driving rotation into pharma, IT pockets, and energy upstream. Sector dispersion is high; defensive/upstream beta working while financials and metals lag. With weekend approaching and existing book already +0.68% on the day, priority is locking in gains via SL trails on winners rather than stacking new entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1022.00,
      "new_target": 1075.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+4.9% unrealized; sub-1% GNPA re-rating thesis intact. Trail SL from 1018 → 1022 (still ~1% below LTP 1031.85, satisfies 0.5% trail-gap). Tighten target to 1075 — closer to recent supply zone 1052-1060 — to allow earlier book in volatile rate-sensitive name. Risk now ~1% from CMP, reward ~4%."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.8% unrealized but consolidating; gold defensive thesis intact with VIX +6.5% and crude $120. SL 119 (~3.1% below CMP 122.82) is appropriate for ETF volatility. Target 135 still valid on Iran/Hormuz premium + Akshaya Tritiya physical demand. No trail needed — position is underwater, not in profit zone."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1770.00,
      "new_target": 1830.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+3.4% with 2.9x volume on Organon deal narrative + pharma sector strength. Trail SL 1762 → 1770 — still ~0.9% below CMP 1786 (satisfies trail-gap), locks in ~+2% from entry. Q4 results May 19 is a binary event ~13 trading days away; will need to re-evaluate exit closer to print. Target 1830 unchanged — near 52-week high 1851."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 476.00,
      "new_target": 500.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.7% but stock has reversed from intraday high 491 to 481 — exhaustion candle after the 52-wk-high breakout yesterday. SL 476 already stored; current value is at the low edge, ~1% below CMP 481.70 (satisfies gap). No-op on SL — keeping HOLD but explicitly NOT loosening. If stock breaks 478 today, SL triggers and that's the right outcome. NOT raising further given the intraday reversal pattern is bearish."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 193.00,
      "new_target": 210.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.9% on entry but stock is +9.94% today on Q4 PAT +69% beat — gap held above 194. Average entry of 200 was at the high of the move; CMP 196.40. SL 195 sits ~0.7% below CMP and is too tight given 4-rupee intraday range — single noise candle stops me. Loosen to 193 — wait, that's loosening which is rejected. KEEP SL at 195 is fine but the engine treats new_stop_loss BELOW stored as rejection. Reverting: do NOT modify — keep HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.9% unrealized; thesis (Brent $120, Iran blockade, upstream beneficiary) intact but stock is failing to confirm with -0.4% today despite Brent surge. SL 295 is ~1.6% below CMP — appropriate. Target 322 unchanged. Watching for Q4 results catalyst in May."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.8% unrealized, pharma defensive thesis playing out. SL 22.85 (~4% below CMP 23.84) appropriate for ETF; target 24.95 reachable. Not enough profit yet to trail to breakeven."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1022.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL up to lock in +3.9% on a name already +5% in profit; tightens risk while leaving 4% upside to revised target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Underwater; no trail justified. Geopolitical/inflation hedge remains relevant."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1770.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail to lock in +2% on the Organon-deal-driven move while leaving room for further breakout to 1830."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 476 already appropriately placed at a level that triggers if intraday reversal continues. Bearish engulfing on Apr 27 + intraday reversal today argues against trailing tighter into a name already close to breakdown level."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Underwater on entry timing despite +10% day. SL 195 is tight but cannot loosen per engine rules. Q4 thesis intact; let SL determine outcome."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Position not yet in profit; SL appropriately placed."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Marginal profit, ETF volatility low, current SL appropriate."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BAJFINANCE pending BUY @ 944 (LIMIT, OPEN 385min) — CMP 948.50, may not fill. Q4 beat + ₹5L cr AUM milestone is intact. Leave order working through close — if it fills, good entry; if not, will re-evaluate Monday. GESHIP pending BUY @ 1542 (LIMIT, OPEN 445min) — CMP 1584.90, stock ran away. Order is now ~2.7% below market and unlikely to fill without a pullback. CANCEL recommended but will let it expire EOD given intraday session is short. SUNPHARMA Q4 (May 19), COALINDIA, BANDHANBNK, BHARTIARTL Q4 (May 19) — multiple binary events approaching for held names; will re-assess sizing through next week. SYNGENE +14% on FY26 PAT -20% with leadership churn — avoid; bearish setup despite price spike. CHENNPETRO at 52w-high after +203% Q4 PAT — interesting but I already have ONGC + COALINDIA in energy cluster, no new energy adds this session.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is +0.68% today, deployed 37%, cash 63% — well within limits. No new entries this session: (a) cluster discipline — already have ONGC (energy upstream), COALINDIA (energy/metal), PHARMABEES + SUNPHARMA (pharma), PNBHOUSING + BANDHANBNK (financials). Adding RELIANCE/CHENNPETRO/CIL more would breach cluster intent. (b) VIX +6.5% with weekend approaching — not the moment to chase breakouts. (c) Two pending BUYs (BAJFINANCE, GESHIP) already represent latent additions. Focus: trailing SLs on winners (PNBHOUSING, SUNPHARMA) to convert paper gains to locked-in profit. 5-day performance dismal (13% win rate, profit factor 0.5x) — discipline over activity is the right correction."
}
